name: Apple-Pecan Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve lemon gelatin in 1-1/4 cups boiling water; cool slightly.
Combine sour cream, mayonnaise, sugar, and lemon juice. Blend the mixture into the lemon gelatin. Chill until slightly thickened, about 1 hour - then fold in apples and pecans.
2. Meanwhile, dissolve orange gelatin in 1 cup boiling water. Add apple juice. Pour 2/3 cup of liquid into a 6-cup ring mold. Chill until set but not firm, about 30 minutes. Chill the remaining orange gelatin mixture until slightly thickened.
3. Spoon the lemon gelatin mixture over the orange gelatin in the mold and top with the remaining orange gelatin. Chill until firm - at least 4 hours, but overnight if possible to ensure a very firm salad that will unmold easily.
